prevalence.source: PNTN newborn screening reports; endocrine epidemiology

burden.dalyPerCapita: low with early treatment; high disability without treatment

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Elevated TSH/low T4 on newborn screening; confirmatory serum testing

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Screening in maternity services; confirmatory testing in referral labs
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Early levothyroxine replacement with regular monitoring
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Established newborn screening pathway and effective treatment
